args.subject: Action Required: Coordinate with development team to start initial phase — Deadline 2024-05-20
args.body:
Hi David,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024), your assigned action item is:

• Task: Coordinate with the development team to start the initial phase.
• Deadline: 2024-05-20

Please complete the following specific steps by 2024-05-20:
1) Confirm the list of developers and resources required for the initial phase and assign ownership for each deliverable.
2) Create and share a kickoff checklist that includes scope, key milestones, and acceptance criteria.
3) Schedule and send a calendar invite for the development kickoff meeting (include date/time, agenda, and required attendees).
4) Update the project plan with confirmed start dates, task owners, and estimated durations for the initial phase.

When finished, reply to this email with (a) the calendar invite or meeting time, and (b) the updated project plan or a short status summary.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Required: Email meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx to john.mitchell@gmail.com — Deadline 2024-05-21
args.body:
Hi Linda,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024), your assigned action item is:

• Task: Email the 'meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx' file to john.mitchell@gmail.com for review.
• Deadline: 2024-05-21

Please complete the following specific steps by 2024-05-21:
1) Locate the file 'meeting-agenda-2024-05-15.docx' in the cloud drive.
2) Confirm the file version is the final draft; if not, make the necessary edits or confirm who will.
3) Email the file as an attachment to john.mitchell@gmail.com with a brief note asking for review and any requested changes.
4) Reply-all to this email (or reply to me) confirming the email was sent and include the sent email as an attachment or screenshot.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech

args.subject: Action Required: Review sales projections and provide feedback — Deadline 2024-05-19
args.body:
Hi Mark,

Per the Team Meeting Minutes (Team Meeting Minutes - May 17, 2024), your assigned action item is:

• Task: Review the sales projections and provide feedback.
• Deadline: 2024-05-19

Please complete the following specific steps by 2024-05-19:
1) Review the attached sales projections document (or locate the latest version in the shared drive).
2) Provide line-by-line comments on assumptions, estimated numbers, and risks.
3) Propose at least three specific recommendations to improve accuracy or potential upside.
4) Deliver a short written summary (max one page) and a tracked-change version or annotated file.

When finished, reply to this email with the summary and annotated document attached.

Thanks,
Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
